narrative: Strait of Hormuz disruption and oil supply shocks drive a geopolitical risk premium as the ECB signals June policy hinges on a fast resolution — EUR/USD retreats to 1.1710 on a +175bp Fed-ECB carry advantage. AUD/JPY bilateral divergence dominates G8 flows (1.262% spread) as RBA-BoJ +175bp carry fuels the AUD bid; gold higher +0.28% near $4,700; equities -0.16%; DXY +0.19%; VIX 17.9. Watch RBNZ meeting May 27.
